text:
いやー、やっぱおたくはすげーわ！
いとも簡単に倒しちまうんだもんな。

ま、これでオレにも
倒せるイメージができたし
ちょっくら浮上施設に行ってくるわ！

You're seriously impressive, pal! You offed 'em
like fish in a barrel.

I can totally see myself tearing 'em down now.
I'm gonna hop right on over to the Floating
Facility!

Seriously, thanks a ton.
I'll be counting on ya again!
